reviews.comment:
Estacion full. Linda y amplia. Recientemente restaurada. Buena atencion.
Se puede inflar los neumaticos, sin cargo.

Full service station. Nice and spacious. Recently renovated. Good service.
Tire inflation is free.

reviews.comment:
Soy socio
Cuento con un 5% de descuento en combustibles y se suma al descuento de la app YPF
Para los socios no necesitamos mostrar el carnet  ya la aplicación realiza todos los descuentos y el servicio tanto en la playa como en el salón son excelentes

(Translated by Google)
I'm a member
I get a 5% discount on fuel, which is added to the YPF app discount.
Members don't need to show their ID, as the app provides all the discounts. The service, both on the beach and in the lounge, is excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURONlpTaXhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los chicos del shop son excelentes!!!
El lugar es especial para hacer una parada camino a casa. Es un lugar perfecto para hacer juntadas (motos, bicis, autos de colección, etc)

(Translated by Google)
The guys at the shop are excellent!
It's a great place to stop on the way home. It's perfect for gatherings (motorcycles, bicycles, classic cars, etc.).
